summary: Iteration 20 Testing COMPLETED: Admin Membership Settings, Member Change Password, View Full Bio, Steps to Complete Profile, and Profile Completion Progress Bar. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified and working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/membership-settings returns mandatory_fields array
Backend: PUT /api/admin/membership-settings saves mandatory_fields
Backend: PUT /api/admin/membership-settings accepts ebank fields (ebank.investment_amount, etc.)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/membership-settings accepts empty array
Backend: GET /api/public/membership-settings returns mandatory_fields (no auth required)
Backend: PUT /api/member/change-password validates min 8 characters
Backend: PUT /api/member/change-password validates password match
Backend: PUT /api/member/change-password changes password successfully
Backend: PUT /api/member/change-password requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/member/me returns member data
Backend: Admin membership settings endpoint accessible
Frontend: Admin sidebar shows 'Membership Settings' entry
Frontend: Admin Membership Settings page loads at /admin/membership-settings
Frontend: Profile Fields section with 16 checkboxes (first_name, last_name, email, etc.)
Frontend: Ebank Fields section with 16 checkboxes (investment_amount, risk_level, etc.)
Frontend: Save Settings button present and functional
Frontend: Select All / Deselect All buttons work for each section
Frontend: Member Profile shows Profile Completion section with progress bar
Frontend: Profile completion percentage calculated correctly (40% for admin with 2/5 mandatory fields)
Frontend: Change Password button opens modal
Frontend: Change Password modal has new_password and confirm_password inputs
Frontend: View Full Bio button opens modal
Frontend: View Full Bio modal shows summary and biography (or 'not written yet' messages)
Frontend: Steps to Complete Profile button opens modal
Frontend: Steps modal shows Required Fields (3) and Optional Fields (14) correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Dialog modals missing aria-describedby for accessibility - consider adding DialogDescription component
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 verified: (1) Admin Membership Settings page at /admin/membership-settings allows selecting mandatory fields for profile completion. (2) GET/PUT /api/admin/membership-settings for admin CRUD. (3) GET /api/public/membership-settings for public/member consumption. (4) PUT /api/member/change-password validates min 8 chars, password match, and updates password. (5) Member Profile at /my-account/membership-profile shows Profile Completion section with progress bar (percentage based on mandatory fields). (6) Three new modals: Change Password, View Full Bio, Steps to Complete Profile. (7) Steps modal shows missing mandatory fields (red) vs optional fields (gray). (8) Admin member has 40% completion (2/5 mandatory fields filled: first_name, email).

public_membership_settings.description: Returns mandatory_fields for public/member consumption (no auth required)

member_change_password.ui_modal: Change Password modal with new_password and confirm_password inputs

profile_completion.progress_bar: Shows percentage based on mandatory fields only

view_full_bio_modal.description: Shows formatted HTML content for summary and biography

steps_to_complete_modal.description: Shows missing mandatory fields (red) vs optional fields (gray)
